message:
🌐 i18n: extract hardcoded user-facing strings (Fixes #8149) (#8154)

Extract 5 hardcoded user-facing strings to i18n translations:
- CanIChecker: "Select common groups..." dropdown placeholder
- Compute: "Cluster Comparison" section header
- DrasiReactiveGraph: Cancel/Save buttons in Source and Query config modals

Reuses existing actions.save / actions.cancel keys for Drasi buttons.
Adds rbac.selectCommonGroups and compute.clusterComparison keys.

Skips legitimate exclusions flagged by Auto-QA: *.stories.tsx,
*.test.tsx, StatusBadge color props, and the Mellanox vendor brand
name in HardwareHealthCard.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -204,7 +204,7 @@ export function Compute() { aria-controls="cluster-comparison-list" > - Cluster Comparison + {t('compute.clusterComparison')} {showClusterList ? : } {selectedForComparison.length > 0 && (

     "binding": "Binding",

-    "clusterRoleBinding": "Cluster Role Binding"
+    "clusterRoleBinding": "Cluster Role Binding",
+    "selectCommonGroups": "Select common groups..."
